per_outcome.operationalization: Mean of 12 self-reported measures on 1-5 scale covering satisfaction, performance, communication, efficiency, and overall productivity perception
Ratio of AI-generated code completions shown that were accepted by the developer
Ratio of completion opportunities where the AI system displayed a suggestion to the user
Ratio of accepted completions that remained unchanged after 30, 120, 300, and 600 seconds
Ratio of accepted completions that remained mostly unchanged after 30, 120, 300, and 600 seconds
Ratio of completion opportunities resulting in accepted completions unchanged after 30, 120, 300, and 600 seconds
Number of characters in accepted completions per distinct active hour of coding
Number of accepted completions per distinct active hour of coding
Number of unchanged completions per distinct active hour of coding
Total count of completions shown to the user across the study period
Number of shown completions per distinct active hour, measuring system suggestion frequency
Number of shown completions per opportunity, measuring system propensity to suggest
Self-reported perception of code quality on 1-5 scale from SPACE framework
Self-reported flow state maintenance on 1-5 scale from SPACE framework
Self-reported satisfaction with focus on 1-5 scale from SPACE framework
Self-reported effort reduction on repetitive tasks on 1-5 scale from SPACE framework
Self-reported speed on repetitive tasks on 1-5 scale from SPACE framework
Self-reported frustration reduction on 1-5 scale from SPACE framework
Self-reported progress on unfamiliar tasks on 1-5 scale from SPACE framework
